form.formComment: Last start finished 7th on March 30 over 365m at Nowra behind Cumbria Rich beaten 3.5 lengths (21.47) in a Grade 5. Good beginner and should go close off the inside draw.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Last start finished 7th on March 30 over 365m at Nowra behind Cumbria Rich beaten 3.5 lengths (21.47) in a Grade 5. Good beginner and should go close off the inside draw.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: At the first turn crowded for room and came together.
Lost ground in the back straight; Finished off the tail of the field.

form.formComment: Inside draw could be an advantage. Last start finished sixth on March 31 over 388m at Gosford behind Tiny Sniffy, beaten 12 lengths (23.50) in a Grade 5. Will find this a little easier. Capable of taking this out.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Inside draw could be an advantage. Last start finished sixth on March 31 over 388m at Gosford behind Tiny Sniffy, beaten 12 lengths (23.50) in a Grade 5. Will find this a little easier. Capable of taking this out.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Began only fairly; Became awkward in action soon after the start.

form.formComment: Latest effort finished 3rd over 320m at this track beaten 0.8 lengths (18.58) behind Tap Out Boston in a Grade 5 on April 17. Fought on last time. Right in the mix again.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Latest effort finished 3rd over 320m at this track beaten 0.8 lengths (18.58) behind Tap Out Boston in a Grade 5 on April 17. Fought on last time. Right in the mix again.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Checked off heels nearing the entrance to home straight.
Shifted off the rail in the first turn then came together and lost ground.
Nearing the 722m boxes wanted to shift in.

form.formComment: Good effort last time when second (18.51) over 320m at this track. Drawn awkwardly. Will need plenty of luck.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Good effort last time when second (18.51) over 320m at this track. Drawn awkwardly. Will need plenty of luck.

form.formComment: Strong performance to win by 0.8 lengths at this track over 320m (18.46) beating Glimmer Girl in Grade 5 on April 12. Has hit winning form and can measure up again.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Strong performance to win by 0.8 lengths at this track over 320m (18.46) beating Glimmer Girl in Grade 5 on April 12. Has hit winning form and can measure up again.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Led for the majority of the race and ran down in the home turn.
Checked off heels entering the first turn and lost ground.

form.formComment: Jumps from box 6 for the first time after placing latest at this track (18.48) in a Grade 5. Can hit the frame with the right run.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Jumps from box 6 for the first time after placing latest at this track (18.48) in a Grade 5. Can hit the frame with the right run.

form.formComment: Won two starts back when well in the market at this track over 320m. Last start finished 2nd on March 29 over 320m at this track behind Harmony Keeping beaten 4.5 lengths (18.54) in a Grade 5. Has ability and can run well.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Won two starts back when well in the market at this track over 320m. Last start finished 2nd on March 29 over 320m at this track behind Harmony Keeping beaten 4.5 lengths (18.54) in a Grade 5. Has ability and can run well.

form.formComment: Starting from wide draw and has been unwanted at recent poor starts. Risky starter likely to be additionally hampered by wide draw. Looking to others this time.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Starting from wide draw and has been unwanted at recent poor starts. Risky starter likely to be additionally hampered by wide draw. Looking to others this time.

form.formComment: Has not shown much in recent runs. Could only manage sixth last time out over 324m at Richmond Straight. Better off looking to others.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Has not shown much in recent runs. Could only manage sixth last time out over 324m at Richmond Straight. Better off looking to others.

form.formComment: Has been unwanted at recent poor starts. Hard to recommend this time.

formComments.comment: Has been unwanted at recent poor starts. Hard to recommend this time.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: At first turn wanted to shift up track and collided.
Checked off heels at first corner.
